title: Starvasion
body:
**Starvasion** invites you to experience an exhilarating new challenge in Minecraft! Prepare yourself for an infinite invasion of alien starfish that will test your survival skills like never before. These otherworldly creatures invade your world, multiplying with each encounter, creating a thrilling sense of urgency as you strategize to contain their relentless growth.  Dive into this cosmic adventure and see if you can survive the ultimate extraterrestrial challenge!

- To start , You will need to find a suspicious gravel containing a petrified starfish in a structure called meteorite .
- Use regeneration potions on petrified starfishes to resurect them , use weakness potions to petrify them .
- Starfishes evolve into two formes.
